notes: Has multiple meanings: a bowl/dish for serving food, the hard outer shell of an egg or nut, or the peel/skin of a fruit or vegetable.

sentences.german: Ich lege die Äpfel in eine große Schale.
sentences.english: I put the apples in a large bowl.

sentences.german: Die Schale der Orange ist sehr dick.
sentences.english: The peel of the orange is very thick.

sentences.german: Das Küken bricht die Schale des Eis auf.
sentences.english: The chick breaks the shell of the egg.
